entries.definition:
ʾ–b–b herbage, pasture, yield of the land; to up and go, to
prepare to go; water; mirage. Of this root, أَبٌّ ʾabb occurs once in
the Qur’an.

أَبٌّ ʾabb [n. a rare word the meaning of which was reportedly
not known to ʿumar ʾibn ʾal-Khaṭṭāb, the second caliph (ʾal-
ʾitqān)] food produced from the land, herbage, pasture (80:31)
وَفَاكِهَةً وَأَبًّا and fruits and fodder.
